---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new roadmap phase, topic, or website improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Use Case

How would this feature help learners? What problem does it solve?

## 📋 Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas on how to implement this, describe them here.

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This feature would benefit the learning community
